mapper.select: select va.id, va.appointment_time, va.appointment_status, ai.id as ai_id, ai.name as "apartmentName" from view_appointment as va left join apartment_info as ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.is_release = 1 where va.user_id = #{userId} and va.is_deleted = 0 and va.appointment_status = 1
select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 1 and item_id = #{ai_id} and is_deleted = 0
